title: Garlic Chicken and Potatoes Skillet (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Garlic Chicken and Potatoes Skillet is a one-pan dinner that combines juicy chicken with filling potatoes and bold garlic-herb flavor. It is easy to cook, easy to portion, and simple to log in Eati.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Potatoes
- Garlic
- Herbs (thyme or Italian seasoning)
- Olive oil
- Onion
- Chicken broth
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Season chicken and set aside.
2. Sear chicken in a skillet with olive oil until browned.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook until fragrant.
4. Add potatoes and broth; cover and simmer until potatoes are tender.
5. Finish with herbs, adjust seasoning, then serve and log your portion in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 504 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 21g
Protein: 43g

Tip: keep the oil measured to control fat while keeping flavor strong.

conclusion: This skillet recipe is a dependable high-protein weeknight option. Track it in Eati so your portions match your fat-loss plan.
